/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++11 -shared -Wl,-soname,libiit_commons.so -o libiit_commons.so CMakeFiles/iit_commons.dir/src/hydraulics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iit_commons.dir/src/fbl/four_bar_linkage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iit_commons.dir/src/control/VirtualModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iit_commons.dir/src/planning.cpp.o
